name: csharp-foundation
description: Shared C#/.NET foundation skills for the SDLC marketplace. Contains stack-agnostic conventions: csharp-conventions (modern C# idioms — nullable reference types, records, pattern matching, async/await, IDisposable, naming), dotnet-tooling (dotnet CLI, NuGet, csproj/sln, central package management, dotnet format) and dotnet-testing (xUnit, Moq/NSubstitute, FluentAssertions, coverlet). Referenced cross-plugin by every .NET framework provider in the marketplace. No agent, no stack profile — pure shared library.
